prompt: On-call got burned twice this week by the metrics alerter. Tuesday: cpu_percent pinned at 97 for ten minutes, limit is 90, zero alerts. Thursday: error_rate blipped over its limit and we got paged for cpu_percent, queue_depth AND error_rate all at once — three pages for one blip. It behaves as if every rule is checking the same metric no matter which metric it was installed for. rule_count() reports all three rules present, so loading isn't dropping them. python3 test_alerts.py reproduces both misfires. Track it down in alerts.py and make the tests green without editing test_alerts.py.
